title: Everything is a bag
description: A Fabric storage mod that lets you turn almost any item into an openable bag with its own inventory.
body:
Everything is a Bag is a Fabric storage mod that adds portable bags and lets you turn almost any item into a bag.

Included bags:
- Belt bag
- Small modern bag
- Small backpack
- Modern backpack

![bags](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kJ8aZ8aF/images/48caa1de194dd2ebdf78f1d42fe6db5f46b061ed.png)

The mod also adds special expanders that can transform items into portable storage.

To use one, hold the expander in your main hand, place the item you want to turn into a bag in your offhand, and right-click.  
The item will become a bag with its own inventory.

This is useful for survival, roleplay, themed inventories, and servers that want more flexible storage options.

![Everything is a bag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kJ8aZ8aF/images/5c6645445564ae4ec83fcac3efb720ee9eb577d8.png)

You can also use the `/makebag` command for quick bag creation.  
For now, bags created this way have 9 slots.
